q1.question: What is Project Ledger?
q1.answer: Project Ledger is a personal portfolio project showcasing full-stack development skills. It lets you manage projects, track budgets and make decisions with AI assistance.

q2.question: Is it free?
q2.answer: Yes, it's completely free. This project uses a permanent Free plan with no time limit. No payment or subscription required.

q3.question: Do I need a credit card to sign up?
q3.answer: No. You can create your account without entering any payment details.

q4.question: What technologies is it built with?
q4.answer: The frontend uses Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. The backend is a .NET REST API deployed on Azure with PostgreSQL (CockroachDB). OCR uses Azure Document Intelligence and the AI chatbot consumes free AI agents.

q1.question: How do I create a project?
q1.answer: Go to the "Projects" section in the sidebar and click "New project". Fill in the name, description, budget and currency, and your project will be ready.

q2.question: Can I invite other members to my projects?
q2.answer: Yes, from the project detail you can add members by email with differentiated permissions.

q3.question: What types of expenses can I record?
q3.answer: You can record any expense associated with the project: materials, services, fees, etc. Each expense includes a date, amount, category, payment method and optional description.

q4.question: Can I use multiple currencies?
q4.answer: Yes. Each project has a base currency and you can record movements in other currencies with automatic conversion.

q1.question: Can I subscribe to a paid plan?
q1.answer: No. Billing is disabled in this MVP. It's a portfolio project and all features are available for free.

q2.question: Are there paid plans?
q2.answer: Not at the moment. The product is in MVP phase and all features are available at no cost.

q3.question: Where is the backend deployed?
q3.answer: The backend is a .NET REST API deployed on Azure. The database is PostgreSQL (CockroachDB) in the cloud.

q1.question: Is my data safe?
q1.answer: This is a personal portfolio project. Data is stored in PostgreSQL (CockroachDB) deployed on Azure and you have full control to delete your account whenever you want.

q2.question: How does authentication work?
q2.answer: We use JWT with access and refresh tokens. Sessions expire and rotate automatically. Tokens are stored securely in the browser.

q3.question: Can I delete my account?
q3.answer: Yes. From Settings you can permanently delete your account and all associated data.

q1.question: How does the AI assistant work?
q1.answer: Aria's chatbot consumes free AI agents. You can ask questions about your projects, request financial analysis or check the history.

q2.question: Does the assistant have access to my data?
q2.answer: The assistant only accesses the data of the active project in your session. It never shares information between users.
